title: bug affecting simple function to pick an item at random
description:
### What happens?

My bug, my apologies.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_array (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, values TEXT);
SELECT substr(values, 1, instr(values, ',') - 1) AS value FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT substr(values, instr(values, ',') + 1, instr(values || ',', ',', instr(values, ',') + 1) - instr(values, ',') - 1) AS value FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT NULLIF(substr(values, instr(values, ',', instr(values, ',') + 1) + 1), '') AS value FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: selecting an out-of-bounds index from an array
